content.en:
Ye Tian started to cultivate from the first technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, and in just a few minutes, Ye Tian had practiced the first technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, and the speed was beyond imagination.

Then, Ye Tian began to cultivate the second technique of the Nine Soul Forging Techniques, constantly compressing his divine soul.

The second technique of the Nine Soul Breaking Techniques was more difficult, but Ye Tian still practiced it in one day.

At this time, Ye Tian began to cultivate the third technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, and the three True Monarchs such as Longhai True Monarch had just practiced the third technique, and had not yet practiced the fourth technique.

It took three days for Ye Tiancai to practice the third technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, which can be regarded as catching up with the three of Longhai Zhenjun.

After that, Ye Tianhua spent five days practicing the fourth of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging.

The fifth technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, it took Ye Tian ten days to practice.

And the sixth technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging was far more difficult than the fifth Technique, and it took Ye Tian a month to finally practice it.

At this time, Ye Tian could be regarded as having completed the assessment.

Ye Tian took a look at the three of Longhai Zhenjun and saw that they were still participating in the cultivation process, so he knew that they had not completed the assessment, and perhaps they were still cultivating the fourth or fifth technique.

Ye Tian didn't disturb Longhai Zhenjun, and his consciousness communicated with the black giant monument, showing the success of the sixth technique of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, and was sucked into the next layer by the black giant color.

When Ye Tian disappeared, the three of Longhai Zhenjun noticed it.

"Little junior brother, this is ...... Passed the assessment?"

Long Hai Zhenjun was shocked.

However, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch and the Youhe True Monarch were extremely envious and jealous, they came much earlier than Ye Tian, and they were still in the cultivation of the fourth technique, while Ye Tian had completed the cultivation of the sixth technique, this cultivation speed was too fast.

"Damn, shouldn't the Ten Thousand Law Daozi really be able to become the Reserve Peak Master of Black Wind Mountain?"

Ghost Shadow True Monarch thought to himself.

His goal was not to become the Reserve Peak Master of Black Wind Mountain, but he was reluctant to forge the Nine Secrets.

The first six techniques of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging are not too much to improve the Divine Soul, but they are just compressed, making the Divine Soul defense stronger, but once the cultivation reaches the seventh technique, the Divine Soul will truly change qualitatively, and even increase some potential.

For them, the secret technique of the Nine Secret Techniques of Soul Forging was too precious, even more precious than the Dao Weapon.

Perhaps the secret technique of the Nine Secret Techniques of Soul Forging was nothing in the Domain Realm, but there was no Soul Secret Technique comparable to the Nine Secret Techniques of Soul Forging in this chaotic region, so they were very rare in this opportunity.

And once you have practiced the sixth layer of the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, even if you can't complete the assessment below, you can still bring out the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging, but you can't teach them to others.

......

Ye Tian left the first level of assessment, and came to the second layer of the assessment hall of the Demon God Statue, which was only one layer away from the top, but the divine sense could not penetrate, as if it was separated by a long distance.

Ye Tian came here and also knew about the assessment at this level.

Combat power assessment!

The Reserve Peak Master also has requirements for strength, and it is not necessary to have strong potential to become a Reserve Peak Master.

For example, in the first level of assessment, as long as the talent is good, even a Tianjun can pass the assessment.

But the second level is different, if the strength is not enough, there is still no way to pass the assessment.

Rumble!!!!!

A black light shone on Ye Tian's body, and then appeared in the distance, slowly forming a figure, it was a black Ye Tian who was very similar to Ye Tian and had cultivated to the extreme of the True Spirit Realm.

Black Ye Tian's cultivation seemed to be only the ultimate in the True Spirit Realm, but his aura was very powerful, far surpassing the other True Monarchs at the extreme of the True Spirit Realm.

In addition, the black Ye Tian has strange lines on his body, and the power of qi and blood is also extremely strong, which shows the strength of his physical body.

Ye Tian looked at Ye Tian, and he didn't understand how this black Ye Tian was formed, it didn't look like an illusion or the incarnation of the law, but like a real life.

It's just that Ye Tian's copying talent didn't detect any talent from the black Ye Tian, and the other party was nothing, as if he was a puppet.

In this level of assessment, as long as this black Ye Tian is defeated, Ye Tian will be considered to have completed the assessment.

The battle begins in an instant!

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian touched the other party, and the two separated instantly.

But Ye Tian was full of shock, because the other party had at least half of his physical strength!

You must know how powerful his physical body is, and the other party has the same cultivation as him, but he has half of the power of his physical body, and he is also very thorough about the power of the Great Dao, and his combat skills are also very extraordinary, and he has even mastered many secret techniques and chaotic supernatural powers.

Such an opponent, even if he was the first true monarch on the list before, may not be able to beat it! No, if you don't rely on strange things, but only rely on your own strength, it is very likely that you can't beat it.

"True Monarch level, except for me, it is impossible for other True Monarchs to pass the Preparatory Peak Master Assessment. And the assessment of the half-step True Ancestor is definitely more difficult, and the opponent who needs to face the half-step True Ancestor cannot succeed in the assessment!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, Black Ye Tian attacked again.

Ye Tian no longer hid his strength, and with his powerful strength, he shattered this black Ye Tian in a few breaths.

I saw that after the black Ye Tian was torn, it turned into black light and disappeared.

Pass the assessment!

Then, Ye Tian was led to the lowest and last level of assessment of the Demon God Statue.

In fact, there are only three levels of the preparatory peak master assessment, and there are not so many assessments, after all, it proves that there is strength and potential, and it is enough to become a reserve peak master, which is enough.

Black Wind Mountain does not have high requirements for other things, so there is not so much assessment content.

And the third level assessment is not an assessment in the real sense, just a practice of a practice.

The soul forging nine tricks of the first level are actually not real cultivation, just a test, and the exercises of the third level are real cultivation, and only by cultivating this exercise can you prepare for the peak master.

"Black Wind Realm Technique!"

This is a top-notch realm technique, and it is not known how many grades higher than the Golden Eye Realm that Ye Tian cultivated before.

The Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique is also one of the symbols of Black Wind Mountain, and only strong people above the Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master are qualified to cultivate.

But not everyone can practice the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, for example, a true ancestor in the late stage of the Great Dao in the Black Wind Mountain, if you can't practice the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, then I'm sorry, you can't become a peak master.

Ye Tian didn't know why he had to cultivate the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique in the third level of the assessment at first, nor did he understand what the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique had to do with becoming a Preparatory Peak Master, but after truly inheriting this Realm, he knew the reason.

It turned out that the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique was not only a top-notch realm technique, but also could enter the unique realm opened up by the Ten Kings.

In this way, if the Black Wind Mountain summons a meeting of the peak lord and the general, it can directly enter the realm of the ten kings, and do everything very hidden.

After all, Black Wind Mountain is strictly a bandit force, not a decent force, and it has offended many forces, so it must be cautious.

Therefore, all the actions and commands of the Black Wind Mountain rely on the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique.

"What a magical realm technique, with such a realm technique, even if the enemy sends a spy, there is no way to know the location of the Ten Kings and other peak masters and generals, even if the spy has practiced the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, he can only participate in meetings and actions, and he can't know the real core secret!" Ye Tian said.

The Ten Kings may have fallen, and the so-called Ten Kings Realm is estimated to no longer exist, but the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique is still a top-notch realm technique, which can ban the Golden Eye Realm, once practiced, it is enough to make Ye Tian's strength skyrocket by a small margin.
